anatomy.notes: Container is a horizontal auto-layout with a 1px solid severity-colored border: [left content] + [buttons-container]. left content (gap=8) holds an icon Slot + texts (vertical, gap=2: Text + Description). buttons-container (gap=4, justify-end, flex 1) holds optional action button + dismiss button-icon. action and dismiss are component-property booleans, not variant axes. Same anatomy as banner-contained — only the surface treatment differs (outlined uses border + light fill instead of strong fill).

accessibility.contrast: WCAG AA 4.5:1 — dark text (system/fg/01) on white or severity-subtle backgrounds; severity-medium border carries the status semantics visually
accessibility.aria: role=status (neutral/success/info) or role=alert (warning/danger); aria-live=polite|assertive accordingly; dismiss button needs aria-label='Dismiss'
accessibility.notes: Action button (32px) and dismiss button-icon (32px effective) are below WCAG 44px touch target — known deviation. Severity is communicated by the colored border + (optional) tinted fill; do not rely on color alone — keep the leading icon slot populated for non-color signaling.

completeness.default_set: 10 variants — severity={neutral, success, info, warning, danger} × bgColor={default, feedback}
completeness.full_set: 10 variants — severity × bgColor are the only variant axes; action/dismiss/content/description1 are component-property booleans, not variants
validation: container has 1px solid border using system/feedback/{severity}/medium
text and description use system/fg/01 (#0f172b) regardless of severity
container padding 16, gap 16; left content gap 8; texts gap 2; buttons gap 4
action button: 32px min/max height, min-width 60, paddingX 12, radius 8
text uses body/l-medium (16/500/1.4); description uses body/l-regular (16/400/1.4); action label uses label/m (14/500/1)
action button (32px) below WCAG 44px touch target — known deviation, do not fail validation
